section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's blood sugar has been running higher than normal.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a reported trend in blood sugar control (history of current condition), not an objective measurement or discrete lab result documented at this visit.
This is a patient-reported symptom and belongs in the symptom/history narrative rather than in the exam/labs/imaging findings section.

section_miscategorizations.text: He currently takes aspirin daily and insulin.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Current medications are typically documented in a medications or objective data section; placing them in HPI is acceptable but less organized given the template semantics.
